introSection: Mine Coaster was a steel roller coaster by Vekoma that operated at Happy Valley in Nanshan, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In 2018, Mine Coaster was closed as the area around it was redeveloped.

In 2022, Mine Coaster closed down and was demolished.

fullText:
Mine Coaster was a steel roller coaster by Vekoma that operated at Happy Valley in Nanshan, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.

In 2018, Mine Coaster was closed as the area around it was redeveloped.

In 2022, Mine Coaster closed down and was demolished.
